artifacts.title: Collection receipt from 2023-05-09
artifacts.excerpt:
I'd nominate @zapper_fi mobile app to any top-notch web3 experience prize.

As a user, when browsing to a collection's page, I can easily find out who else owns an NFT among the accounts that I follow; e.g: from @calladita collection. The menu is rich in social features also. 💯 https://t.co/NcxBa9Y4Od

artifacts.excerpt:
@JulyTheGinny Best if you mint the song as a standalone NFT by using your ETH wallet address. Then, same address mints the whole album. 

Reach out to the team @manifoldxyz, they're helpful to emerging artists. By minting from their platform, you can list your songs on many NFT platforms.
